Frankly, the stakes are extraordinarily high. That's why I keep asking for money -- _**not because I like it, but because we need it to win. And because donors like you really can make the difference!**_

| | | Some 200 Americans will die by gun violence this weekend. Tomorrow the Senate will do nothing. Why? Why won't the Senate take any steps to reduce gun violence? Why won't the Senate even allow a vote on background checks--a bill that passed the House, with bipartisan support, more than 100 days ago? Ask Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell. No, really, ask him: **[Sign our petition to demand that Mitch McConnell allow a vote on background checks.](https://secure.andrewromanoff.com/page/m/7a984c31/33d1dea4/3ae38fff/3a3b55a5/1553253142/VEsH/ "https://secure.andrewromanoff.com/page/s/gun-reform?source=em20190623&utm_medium=email&utm_source=romanoff&utm_content=1+-+Sign+our+petition+to+demand+that+Mitch+M&utm_campaign=EM062319")** **[I want the Senate to act>>](https://secure.andrewromanoff.com/page/m/7a984c31/33d1dea4/3ae38fff/3a3b55a4/1553253142/VEsE/ "https://secure.andrewromanoff.com/page/s/gun-reform?source=em20190623&utm_medium=email&utm_source=romanoff&utm_content=2+-+I+want+the+Senate+to+act+gtgt&utm_campaign=EM062319")** Universal background checks carry almost universal support among the American public. subject: Elections are won because of the little things that add up to something bigger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:

| Team, In my very first election, I won by just a few dozen votes. When that happens, it makes you appreciate the little things that add up to something big. I still feel an overwhelming sense of gratitude to every single person who showed up to help -- without those folks, I wouldn't be where I am today. I'm writing to you now because our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up quickly. Afterward, we'll have to file a report that will show the world what kind of campaign we're building together. In many ways, this marks the end of this phase of our campaign -- we'll hit another gear once the debates begin. [**_The people who chip in before our big deadline will have such an important role in getting this endeavor off the ground -- and I can guarantee you, I 'll never forget it._**](https://act.corybooker. People often point out I'm not like your typical candidate for president -- and ours is nothing close to a typical campaign. We've rejected the special interests who try to influence politicians by bankrolling their campaigns, refusing to take even a dime from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists. We won't give in to cynicism about our future -- the message we have for voters isn't about gloom and doom. I fully recognize the crisis we're in right now, but we're focused on the big, bold things we can get done together to get us out of it. **We 're building a campaign that can and will defeat Trump, but we won't stoop to his perverse brand of tear-you-down politics.** That's not who we are, and that's not what America needs right now. Instead, we're focused on building people up. As we face this public fundraising deadline, I'm asking you to believe in what we're building together -- to take a chance on this campaign. **[**_Please make a donation today. $1 is all it takes._**](https://act.corybooker. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Bridging the broadband divide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Virginia's 7th district spans ten counties across Central Virginia. We have a little bit of everything: dense suburbs, small towns, rolling hills, and farms of all types.
| | Dear Peter,

Virginia's 7th district spans ten counties across Central Virginia. We have a little bit of everything: Dense suburbs, small towns, rolling hills, and farms of all types.

The district is connected by roadways, economic priorities, and family ties -- but not reliable broadband internet! In seven of our ten counties, we lack broadband access. This lack of internet infrastructure creates an economic and educational divide in our district.

Since arriving on Capitol Hill, I've been focused on bridging this divide to ensure rural communities have access to the technical infrastructure necessary to build businesses, close the "homework gap", utilize telemedicine advancements, and create economic opportunity.

The local _Culpeper Star Exponent_ has tracked my efforts since April, when [I led a bipartisan effort](https://act.myngp.com/el/fHPg1ROe2rT3GF131um1UhmqdRl5Gjwr_Mq7SsKih74=/Ld50lFp3pnqJKkA_qW74KuBqFsad7yhqdBG66u0aAe4=) to secure funding for broadband internet. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fHPg1ROe2rT3GF131um1UhmqdRl5Gjwr_Mq7SsKih74=/It-k3GOkd2BD3mTZ_vyamyEr3-jHjE4tMfn2xFmoLmk=) This past week, my advocacy culminated in the passage of [my amendment to our appropriations bill](https://act.myngp.com/el/fHPg1ROe2rT3GF131um1UhmqdRl5Gjwr_Mq7SsKih74=/iJSi4rUF1ZkmWLBPDuNZXIL6vlyah25brwHDDvsJenw=) that will increase broadband grant funding by $55 million dollars. It passed with overwhelming bipartisan support.

The local paper called me "one of the House's loudest voices advocating for rural broadband", and it's true. But I'm not limiting my loud voice to just broadband advocacy -- I'm loudly and fiercely advocating for the priorities of our large, diverse, and majority-making district! **[Help me keep up the fight for all of our communities. If you'd like to support my ongoing efforts, please consider making a donation. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/fHPg1ROe2rT3GF131um1UhmqdRl5Gjwr_Mq7SsKih74=/R1JW_Vyg71mhCahDOaingqEbNrjx1vLMLalikLURilI=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.23_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** | ********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/fHPg1ROe2rT3GF131um1UhmqdRl5Gjwr_Mq7SsKih74=/R1JW_Vyg71mhCahDOaingqEbNrjx1vLMLalikLURilI=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.23_b1_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)********
---
Thank you,

_\- Abigail_

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: no margin for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida Action,
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356b/9e00690/6a5948df/24070433/1186843326/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=em-header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr&source=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr")
People are talking about this latest poll. Let me tell you a story about polls, if you have a moment to spare.
You may have seen the latest news coming out of Florida, that the Democratic contenders in the presidential race are polling neck-and-neck with Trump. This new poll shows Trump losing by just one half of a percentage point to the leading Democratic contender, within the poll's margin of error.

**I'll tell you a story about polls.**

What they don't tell you is that no matter how good or how large the sample is, there's always a margin of error, and about one out of every twenty of them are just plain wrong. I've seen the polls show something completely different than what's happening on the ground, and I'm sure you have, as well.

We know that Florida is going to be close, it always is.

**That's why our mission to register and reengage one million voters is so important.**

**[We simply can't afford any margin for error in accomplishing our mission, which is why I'm asking if you can you pitch in before our first quarterly deadline to help ensure we have the proper resources to flip Florida blue and defeat Trump.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356b/9e00690/6a5948df/24070432/1186843326/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action-eoq-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-++if+consfirstname+FIRSTNAME+we+else+We+e&utm_campaign=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr&source=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr")**

Trump can't be re-elected if he loses Florida, that's the cold hard truth. The analysts and experts know it, you know it, and Trump knows it, too. That's why there are powerful forces trying to stop us, placing obstacles in our way, and will do anything they can to prevent us from achieving our goal.

But, we can't let their attacks discourage us from standing tall and being a part of building a progressive future that can improve the lives of countless people across our nation.

**We can overcome any obstacle they place in our way and fight back against their attacks, but only if we're in this together.**

**[That's why I'm hoping you can help us flip Florida blue and defeat Trump by pitching in what you can before our first quarterly deadline, which is just days away.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356b/9e00690/6a5948df/24070435/1186843326/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action-eoq-deadline?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+Thats+why+Im+hoping+you+can+help+us+flip&utm_campaign=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr&source=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr")**

There will be more polling updates, controversial tweets, and personal attacks. But I'm not going to let them distract me from our mission, and I know you won't either. Together, we can move our nation forward.

Our mission is too important to fail.

Andrew Gillum

_[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356b/9e00690/6a5948df/24070434/1186843326/VEsC/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action-eoq-deadline?refcode=&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+Donate&utm_campaign=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr&source=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr")_

1427 Piedmont Drive E., Suite 2, Tallahassee FL, 32308.

Contributions to Forward Florida Action are not tax-deductible.
Forward Florida Action's mission is to educate the public on progressive policy solutions and to increase voter registration and voter participation in Florida.
You can help lead Florida forward by making a **[contribution](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356b/9e00690/6a5948df/24070437/1186843326/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fwd-fla-action?refcode=em-footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+contribution&utm_campaign=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr&source=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr")** today.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by Forward Florida Action. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, and we'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to **[unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb356b/9e00690/6a5948df/24070436/1186843326/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr&source=es-062319-margin-of-error-fr")**.

subject: Peter, what do you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
While Andy is fighting a court ruling that could end health care coverage for 1.3 million Kentuckians, Matt Bevin is trying to gut our Medicaid program.
|
---
[ ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b64/ad6dc73/150926d3/db41e9e/1409567454/VEsH/ "https://andybeshear.com/")

| | | **Andy Beshear 's
Kentucky Health Care Survey **

_5 Questions
2 Minutes to Complete
Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com_ | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b64/ad6dc73/150926d3/db41e9f/1409567454/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/beshear-hcsurveyr")**
---
Peter,

While Andy is fighting in court to preserve Kentuckians' access to affordable care, **Matt Bevin is trying to let health insurance companies get away with selling cut-rate plans that don 't even cover preexisting conditions, prescription drugs, or mental health care**. That's on top of Bevin's efforts to gut Kentucky's Medicaid program and throw hundreds of thousands of families off their insurance.

Bevin's callous actions threaten to reverse the significant progress we've made in Kentucky since the Affordable Care Act passed. **We have reduced our uninsured rate from 20 percent in 2010 to just 7.5 percent today** \-- the largest reduction in the country!

But if Bevin gets his way, Medicaid enrollment would plummet, and **nearly 100,000 people would lose their coverage**. And even Kentuckians who have insurance could be denied coverage for services deemed "nonessential."

As governor, Andy will put a stop to the nonsense. He'll halt Bevin's effort to throw Kentuckians off the Medicaid program on day one, and **he 'll work to get protections for essential health benefits passed into state law**.

**But Andy wants to hear from you too.[What do you think about Matt Bevin's plan to kick families off their health insurance? Will you take Andy's survey and let him know?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b64/ad6dc73/150926d3/db41e9f/1409567454/VEsF/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/beshear-hcsurveyr")**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: a big test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Our democracy is supposed to give all of us a voice. But over the decades, it’s been corrupted -- serving only those who can pay for access and outcomes, while the rest of us are written off or drawn out of it altogether.
#
Our democracy is supposed to give all of us a voice. But over the decades, it’s been corrupted -- serving only those who can pay for access and outcomes, while the rest of us are written off or drawn out of it altogether.
The result of this corruption is reflected in our inaction on the defining challenges of our time -- as our system fails:
* to confront climate change as our fields flood and our forests burn
* to provide universal health care as families ration their medications
* to take action to stop gun violence as more than 30,000 perish each year

Most Americans agree on solutions to these problems. But our government is captured by those in power. To meet this moment and turn our ambitious plans into reality, we need a new kind of politics -- one that’s fearless about saying what's right and relentless in fighting for progress. A politics that rejects special interests. **That is why our campaign can only be funded by**** _we the people_****.**
We’ve built this campaign $5, $10, $15 at a time; taking nothing from PACs, nothing from lobbyists, and nothing from corporations or special interests. Now we face a big test. On June 30, we will close the books on our FEC deadline and report the money we’ve raised. Reporters and other campaigns will scour over the numbers to gauge our momentum. It’s absolutely critical that we show we can raise millions of dollars without any help from the PACs or special interests.
[Can you chip in $3 today before our FEC deadline to help us post the best possible numbers? Your contributions right now are especially important as we finalize the numbers for our public report.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17943?refcode=ema20190623-38349&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=38349%2E444211%2EXGaiaz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17943?refcode=ema20190623-38349&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=38349%2E444211%2EXGaiaz)**
When you step up to donate to our campaign, you are not only ensuring we have the funds to build the largest grassroots campaign and win. But you are truly changing the face of our democracy, bringing power back into the hands of people. I am so thankful for each and every single one of you.
Beto
